action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Emerson, Prado, Andraca, Arney, Bare, Clancy, DeSmidt, Fitzgerald, Hong, Joers, Kirsch, Madison, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Phelps, Roe, Snodgrass, Stubbs, Udell, Sinicki, J. Jacobson and Stroud; 
cosponsored by Senators Smith, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Hesselbein, Ratcliff, Roys, Spreitzer, Wall and Larson
